audio_creator_deal_allocations_value_req.name: audio_creator_deal_allocations_value_required
audio_creator_deal_allocations_value_req.value: "audio_creator_deal_allocations"."basis_points" is not null or "audio_creator_deal_allocations"."fixed_amount_cents" is not null

audio_creator_deal_events_party_required.name: audio_creator_deal_events_party_required
audio_creator_deal_events_party_required.value: "audio_creator_deal_events"."event_type" not in ('invited', 'viewed', 'accepted', 'rejected') or "audio_creator_deal_events"."party_id" is not null

audio_creator_deals_term_valid.name: audio_creator_deals_term_valid
audio_creator_deals_term_valid.value: "audio_creator_deals"."expires_at" is null or "audio_creator_deals"."effective_at" is null or "audio_creator_deals"."expires_at" > "audio_creator_deals"."effective_at"

audio_file_access_grants_permission_requ.name: audio_file_access_grants_permission_required
audio_file_access_grants_permission_requ.value: "audio_file_access_grants"."can_stream_preview" = true or "audio_file_access_grants"."can_download_original" = true or "audio_file_access_grants"."can_upload_new_version" = true or "audio_file_access_grants"."can_comment" = true or "audio_file_access_grants"."can_approve" = true

audio_file_access_grants_revocation_comp.name: audio_file_access_grants_revocation_complete
audio_file_access_grants_revocation_comp.value: ("audio_file_access_grants"."revoked_at" is null and "audio_file_access_grants"."revoked_by_user_id" is null) or ("audio_file_access_grants"."revoked_at" is not null and "audio_file_access_grants"."revoked_by_user_id" is not null)

audio_file_connections_revocation_comple.name: audio_file_connections_revocation_complete
audio_file_connections_revocation_comple.value: ("audio_file_connections"."revoked_at" is null and "audio_file_connections"."revoked_by_user_id" is null) or ("audio_file_connections"."revoked_at" is not null and "audio_file_connections"."revoked_by_user_id" is not null)

audio_file_pairing_tokens_claim_complete.name: audio_file_pairing_tokens_claim_complete
audio_file_pairing_tokens_claim_complete.value: ("audio_file_pairing_tokens"."consumed_at" is null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."consumed_by_user_id" is null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_id" is null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_one_user_id" is null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_two_user_id" is null) or ("audio_file_pairing_tokens"."consumed_at" is not null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."consumed_by_user_id" is not null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_id" is not null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_one_user_id" is not null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_two_user_id" is not null)

audio_file_pairing_tokens_connection_mem.name: audio_file_pairing_tokens_connection_members_match_claim
audio_file_pairing_tokens_connection_mem.value: "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_id" is null or (("audio_file_pairing_tokens"."created_by_user_id" = "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_one_user_id" and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."consumed_by_user_id" = "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_two_user_id") or ("audio_file_pairing_tokens"."created_by_user_id" = "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_two_user_id" and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."consumed_by_user_id" = "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."connection_member_one_user_id"))

audio_file_pairing_tokens_consumed_or_re.name: audio_file_pairing_tokens_consumed_or_revoked
audio_file_pairing_tokens_consumed_or_re.value: not ("audio_file_pairing_tokens"."consumed_at" is not null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."revoked_at" is not null)

audio_file_pairing_tokens_revocation_com.name: audio_file_pairing_tokens_revocation_complete
audio_file_pairing_tokens_revocation_com.value: ("audio_file_pairing_tokens"."revoked_at" is null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."revoked_by_user_id" is null) or ("audio_file_pairing_tokens"."revoked_at" is not null and "audio_file_pairing_tokens"."revoked_by_user_id" is not null)

audio_project_access_grants_revocation_c.name: audio_project_access_grants_revocation_complete
audio_project_access_grants_revocation_c.value: ("audio_project_access_grants"."revoked_at" is null and "audio_project_access_grants"."revoked_by_user_id" is null) or ("audio_project_access_grants"."revoked_at" is not null and "audio_project_access_grants"."revoked_by_user_id" is not null)

audio_project_asset_versions_audio_metad.name: audio_project_asset_versions_audio_metadata_valid
audio_project_asset_versions_audio_metad.value: ("audio_project_asset_versions"."duration_ms" is null or "audio_project_asset_versions"."duration_ms" > 0) and ("audio_project_asset_versions"."sample_rate_hz" is null or "audio_project_asset_versions"."sample_rate_hz" > 0) and ("audio_project_asset_versions"."bit_depth" is null or "audio_project_asset_versions"."bit_depth" > 0) and ("audio_project_asset_versions"."channel_count" is null or "audio_project_asset_versions"."channel_count" > 0)

audio_project_invitations_acceptance_com.name: audio_project_invitations_acceptance_complete
audio_project_invitations_acceptance_com.value: ("audio_project_invitations"."accepted_at" is null and "audio_project_invitations"."accepted_by_user_id" is null) or ("audio_project_invitations"."accepted_at" is not null and "audio_project_invitations"."accepted_by_user_id" is not null)

audio_project_invitations_revocation_com.name: audio_project_invitations_revocation_complete
audio_project_invitations_revocation_com.value: ("audio_project_invitations"."revoked_at" is null and "audio_project_invitations"."revoked_by_user_id" is null) or ("audio_project_invitations"."revoked_at" is not null and "audio_project_invitations"."revoked_by_user_id" is not null)

audio_project_invitations_accepted_or_re.name: audio_project_invitations_accepted_or_revoked
audio_project_invitations_accepted_or_re.value: not ("audio_project_invitations"."accepted_at" is not null and "audio_project_invitations"."revoked_at" is not null)

audio_upload_sessions_completion_coheren.name: audio_upload_sessions_completion_coherent
audio_upload_sessions_completion_coheren.value: ("audio_upload_sessions"."upload_status" = 'completed' and "audio_upload_sessions"."completed_at" is not null) or ("audio_upload_sessions"."upload_status" <> 'completed' and "audio_upload_sessions"."completed_at" is null)

media_connector_links_resource_required.name: media_connector_links_resource_required
media_connector_links_resource_required.value: "media_connector_links"."project_id" is not null or "media_connector_links"."asset_version_id" is not null

music_catalog_transfers_approval_complet.name: music_catalog_transfers_approval_complete
music_catalog_transfers_approval_complet.value: ("music_catalog_transfers"."artist_cutover_approved_by_user_id" is null and "music_catalog_transfers"."artist_cutover_approved_at" is null and "music_catalog_transfers"."artist_cutover_approval_fingerprint" is null) or ("music_catalog_transfers"."artist_cutover_approved_by_user_id" is not null and "music_catalog_transfers"."artist_cutover_approved_at" is not null and "music_catalog_transfers"."artist_cutover_approval_fingerprint" is not null)

music_distribution_delivery_events_statu.name: music_distribution_delivery_events_status_shape
music_distribution_delivery_events_statu.value: ("music_distribution_delivery_events"."event_type" = 'delivery_created' and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."previous_status" is null and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."next_status" = 'draft') or ("music_distribution_delivery_events"."event_type" = 'status_changed' and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."previous_status" is not null and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."next_status" is not null and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."previous_status" <> "music_distribution_delivery_events"."next_status") or ("music_distribution_delivery_events"."event_type" not in ('delivery_created', 'status_changed') and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."previous_status" is null and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."next_status" is null)

music_distribution_delivery_events_provi.name: music_distribution_delivery_events_provider_shape
music_distribution_delivery_events_provi.value: ("music_distribution_delivery_events"."event_type" = 'provider_webhook' and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."provider_event_id" is not null and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."payload_sha256" is not null and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."actor_user_id" is null) or ("music_distribution_delivery_events"."event_type" <> 'provider_webhook' and "music_distribution_delivery_events"."provider_event_id" is null)

performers_handle_not_reserved.name: performers_handle_not_reserved
performers_handle_not_reserved.value: "performers"."handle" is null or lower("performers"."handle") not in ('admin', 'api', 'app', 'assets', 'auth', 'billing', 'contact', 'discover', 'g', 'help', 'login', 'logout', 'overlay', 'p', 'privacy', 'profile', 'public', 'room', 'settings', 'shells', 'signup', 'support', 'sway', 'talent', 'terms', 'www')
